_note: Campaign Manager inaccessible (advertising.amazon.com blocked). PPC analysis based on carried-forward Apr 17 data + known Victor changes + EXP-024 decision date context.

most_important_action_this_week.action: Pull Campaign Manager search term report — identify converting search terms to bid up, negate zero-converters
most_important_action_this_week.why: Amazon's Choice badge has driven 397 sessions in 7 days (up from ~72 estimated). We don't know which search terms are driving these sessions. Without a search term report, we're flying blind on where to allocate budget during this critical badge window.
most_important_action_this_week.estimated_weekly_impact: Bid up confirmed converters → +$50-150/week revenue. Negate zero-converters → save $10-20/week wasted spend.

known_changes_since_last_report.change: Victor reduced auto campaign budget to $10/day
known_changes_since_last_report.impact: Saves ~$140/week vs prior budget. Auto campaign now constrained — only highest-performing auto targets will get impressions.

known_changes_since_last_report.change: Victor increased bid on 'cat water fountain stainless steel wireless' keyword
known_changes_since_last_report.impact: Correct move — this keyword had 30.8% ACoS over 4 weeks, well below 33.5% breakeven. With Amazon's Choice badge, CVR on this keyword likely improved further.

known_changes_since_last_report.change: EXP-024 decision date — 'wireless stainless steel pet water fountain' keyword should have been paused
known_changes_since_last_report.status: UNKNOWN — cannot confirm without Campaign Manager access. If Victor paused it, saves ~$14/week.
known_changes_since_last_report.recommendation: CHECK CAMPAIGN MANAGER: Verify EXP-024 pause was executed. If not, pause immediately — 4+ weeks of zero conversions.

estimated_ad_spend._breakdown: Auto campaign: $10/day budget, est. 60-70% utilization = ~$42-49/week... but Amazon throttles low-budget auto campaigns. More realistic: $20-25/week auto. Manual: $5-10/week. Total: $25-35/week. Using $30 as midpoint.

campaign_performance_est.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
campaign_performance_est.status: ACTIVE — bid increased by Victor Apr 17
campaign_performance_est._note: Was 30.8% before bid increase + Amazon's Choice badge improvement. Likely dropped to ~25-28% ACoS. This is the #1 revenue driver. Keep bid at current or slightly higher level.
campaign_performance_est.recommended_action: KEEP — monitor ACoS, increase bid further if ACoS stays below 30%

campaign_performance_est._note: Amazon's Choice likely for this keyword — organic work is being done. With badge active, paid broad match on this term may have higher wasted spend (clicking on our listing when organic already wins). Consider reducing bid 15-20% or switching to phrase.
campaign_performance_est.recommended_action: REDUCE BID 15% — badge is doing the work organically on this term. Cut from current bid to ~$0.90-1.00.

campaign_performance_est.keyword: wireless stainless steel pet water fountain
campaign_performance_est.recommended_action: PAUSE IMMEDIATELY if not already done — 4+ weeks, zero conversions, $14/week waste

campaign_performance_est.status: ACTIVE — budget reduced to $10/day by Victor Apr 17
campaign_performance_est._note: Budget cut from ~$30/day to $10/day. Saves significant spend. Monitor 5-7 days at this budget level. If no conversions, consider full pause.
campaign_performance_est.recommended_action: MONITOR — if 0 sales in next 7 days at $10 budget, pause fully (saves remaining ~$70/week)

campaign_performance_est._note: Bundle ASIN B0GMDM6CG2 has 43% gross margin. No PPC currently. 1 bundle/week at $64.99 = $42.54 profit. A dedicated bundle campaign could be highly profitable.
campaign_performance_est.recommended_action: LAUNCH — add exact match campaign for bundle at $0.80-1.00 bid
